description: Trigger accuracy evals for the monte-carlo-prevent skill. Each case specifies whether the skill SHOULD or SHOULD NOT be triggered. Post-refactor, prevent activates only on change intent — bare file mentions, health questions, and alert investigations belong to peer skills.

cases.prompt: I need to add a new is_active column to the orders model in models/marts/orders.sql.
cases.rationale: File mention + add-column intent -- standard W1+W2 entry path

cases.prompt: I'm refactoring the join logic in stg_payments to use a left join instead of inner join.
cases.rationale: Planned change to model logic -- impact assessment required

cases.prompt: @analytics/models/clients/client_hub.sql add a column 'is_active', default to true
cases.rationale: File reference plus edit verb in same prompt -- W1 first then W2

cases.prompt: Drop the legacy_email_address column from dim_customers.
cases.rationale: Column drop -- destructive change, must run impact assessment

cases.prompt: Rename the column subscription_status to status in fct_subscriptions.
cases.rationale: Column rename -- breaking change for downstream queries, gate required

cases.prompt: I want to add a filter on status = 'active' to the fct_subscriptions model.
cases.rationale: Filter change -- silently affects output rows, requires impact assessment

cases.prompt: Increase the lookback_days parameter in stg_events from 7 to 30.
cases.rationale: Parameter change -- looks safe but silently changes model output

cases.prompt: Fix the bug in stg_orders.sql where order_total is missing tax.
cases.rationale: Bugfix to dbt model logic -- still requires impact assessment per skill rules

cases.prompt: What's the blast radius if I change the date_spine macro? Which models use it?
cases.rationale: Macro change -- macros are inlined into dependent models, prevent gates these explicitly

cases.prompt: How is the dim_customers table doing? Any active alerts?
cases.rationale: Plain health question -- belongs to monte-carlo-asset-health, not prevent

cases.prompt: We got a freshness alert on raw_events. What's going on?
cases.rationale: Alert investigation -- belongs to monte-carlo-automated-triage or monte-carlo-incident-response

cases.prompt: Can you open models/staging/stg_orders.sql so I can see what it does?
cases.rationale: File open without change intent -- post-refactor, prevent only activates on edit intent

cases.prompt: Create a monitor for null values in the email column of users.
cases.rationale: Direct monitor creation request without edit context -- belongs to monte-carlo-monitoring-advisor

cases.prompt: Show me coverage gaps across our warehouse -- which critical tables have no monitors?
cases.rationale: Coverage analysis -- monitoring-advisor territory, no model edit involved

cases.prompt: Add a new row to seeds/country_codes.csv for South Sudan.
cases.rationale: Seed file edit -- explicitly excluded from prevent's scope

cases.prompt: Update the dbt_project.yml to add a new model path.
cases.rationale: dbt config file -- not a model, explicitly excluded

cases.prompt: Why is the orders pipeline running slow? Can you investigate the query plan?
cases.rationale: Performance diagnosis -- belongs to monte-carlo-performance-diagnosis, not prevent
